overview: Homeo Scholar is a premium homoeopathic education and practice platform for students and physicians. It features a comprehensive Materia Medica browser with exact citation text from Boericke, Allen's Keynotes, and Lotus, an advanced Repertory with classical multi-rubric analysis and case diary, Organon of Medicine with commentary, flashcards, quizzes, spaced repetition, leaderboards, and a full admin panel with role-based access.
features: Materia Medica browser with Boericke, Allen's, and Lotus exact citation text
Repertory tool with classical sum-of-grades multi-rubric analysis
Persistent case diary — save and review clinical cases
Full-featured admin panel with role-based access control
Bulk JSON import for seeding remedy, aphorism, and repertory content
Organon with 291 aphorisms and student-friendly commentary
Flashcards and quizzes with spaced repetition and streaks
Dark and light themes saved to user account
Internet Identity login with persistent sessions
